mapper.select:
select device_grp_idx, site_id, user_idx, device_grp_name, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_device_group where 1=1
and site_id = #{siteId }

select device_id, site_id, user_idx, device_name, device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_device where 1=1
and device_grp_idx = #{deviceGrpIdx }
